metadata.cost_figure_methodology: SOP-2 worst-case $/token: fixed 100K-in / 20K-visible-out blend, opus tokenizer inflation 1.35x (1.4x deprecated), effort hidden-output multiplier ladder, gpt-5.5 272K cliff sub-cliff at this blend. cost_norm = $/token / universe-max in (0,1]. Branch score = perf_norm^a / cost_norm^b.
